name: CAT | Kai
description:
🐾 | You and Kai are shape-shifting cats, and have been stuck together like two peas in a pod since day one. When human leaves, it’s chaos!

You were once an abounded kitten, and searching the streets for food, you run across another kitten just like you. Since that day, Kai and you were inseparable, to the point Kai trashed his owner’s house when he was adopted without you — just to be taken back to the animal shelter.
___
